overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a rainy, neon-lit Night City environment. The player exits a convenience store, walks along a waterfront promenade with holographic advertisements and glass railings, ascends outdoor stairs, and continues through a vegetated upper walkway with dense tropical foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: convenience store interior with neon lighting

events.description: exits the convenience store through glass doors into the rainy night

agents.ego_description: walking through the store interior toward the exit, passing magazine racks and vending machines

entered.detail: wooden counter with stacked magazines and newspapers
illuminated vending machine with pink and blue lighting
bright cyan neon sign above the exit
automatic glass doors leading to the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a dimly lit convenience store with neon accents. The camera moves forward past a magazine rack and vending machine toward the glass exit doors, then transitions to the rainy exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy waterfront promenade with holographic billboards

events.description: heavy rain becomes visible with water droplets on camera lens and wet reflective ground

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pavement beside the water, neon lights reflecting off the rain-soaked ground

entered.detail: transparent glass barrier separating walkway from the water below
dark water reflecting the cyan neon lights from surrounding buildings
large floating digital billboard displaying animated content
tall vertical light posts emitting bright cyan illumination
tall dark buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a heavy downpour along a waterfront promenade. The wet pavement reflects the pervasive cyan neon lighting from street lamps and holographic advertisements floating above the dark water. Futuristic skyscrapers loom in the background while the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront walkway with glass elevator structure

events.description: slows slightly to observe the glass-enclosed stair structure and water reflections

agents.ego_description: walking past the glass-enclosed stairwell while observing the water and city lights, approaching a seated figure

notable_agents.action: person sitting alone on the outdoor stairs facing the water

entered.detail: modern glass elevator and stair structure with metal framing
wide concrete steps leading down toward the water level
tall palm trees lining the right side of the walkway
metal safety railing with yellow top bar along the right side

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues under building overhangs, passing a glass-enclosed elevator structure on the left. A lone figure sits on the outdoor stairs facing the water. Palm trees and yellow railings line the right side as the player moves through the semi-covered space.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor concrete staircase with vertical lighting and graffiti walls

events.description: begins ascending the wide concrete staircase flanked by walls
passes close to graffiti-covered wall on the right, temporarily obscuring view

agents.ego_description: climbing the wet concrete stairs, passing a person descending on the right side

notable_agents.action: person in checkered pants descending the stairs

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in white graffiti tags and street art
tall cylindrical light fixtures emitting bright white light
lush green plants and trees visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The player turns toward and begins ascending a wide outdoor staircase. The stairs are flanked by graffiti-covered concrete walls on the right and illuminated by vertical cylinder lights. Dense tropical vegetation becomes visible at the top as the player climbs, passing another person descending.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated park walkway with dense tropical vegetation

events.description: emerges from stairs into upper level walkway surrounded by dense foliage

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated concrete path surrounded by dense tropical plants and trees in the rain

entered.detail: metal railings along the left edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the scene opens into an elevated walkway enveloped by dense tropical vegetation. The rain continues to fall as the player moves along the concrete path, with metal railings on the left and lush plants on both sides creating a natural corridor within the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed neon interior of a convenience store out into a rainy, futuristic urban landscape that eventually transitions into a lush, elevated garden. It begins by moving past a magazine rack and vending machine toward the glass exit, emerging into a heavy downpour on a waterfront promenade where cyan neon lights and holographic advertisements reflect off the wet pavement. As the camera advances under building overhangs, the scene shifts past a glass elevator and palm trees before turning toward a wide outdoor staircase flanked by graffiti-covered concrete walls. The perspective then ascends the stairs, passing a descending figure and moving toward a canopy of greenery. Finally, the shot opens onto an elevated walkway where the urban concrete gives way to a natural corridor of dense tropical vegetation under the persistent rain.
